title: Cobblemon Dark Cyan GUI
description: A Cobblemon resource pack that redesigns the PC, Summary, and Party Overlay with a sleek Dark Cyan aesthetic for a modern and cohesive UI.
body:
# Cobblemon Dark Cyan GUI

![Theme](https://i.imgur.com/r8Szk5N.png)

This Cobblemon resource pack completely refreshes the visual experience by redesigning three of the most frequently used interface elements: the PC, Summary screen, and Party Overlay. It introduces a Dark Cyan color palette, blending deep tones with cyan accents to create a clean, modern, and visually appealing style.
